'''Reda Jalooz''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Force-sensitive/Legends|student]] of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] shortly after the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] was founded, c.[[25,000 BBY/Legends|25,000 BBY]]. She stole the [[Kashi Mer talisman]], an heirloom of the [[Kashi Mer Dynasty]] that was rumored to possess a dark power. The talisman was a dark gray stone in the shape of a prism.<ref name="Relic" />

However, several months after stealing it, Jalooz became convinced her actions were wrong, and personally returned to [[Kashi]] to beg for forgiveness. However, shortly after her arrival on Kashi, the system's sun went [[Supernova/Legends|supernova]] destroying Kashi and all of its inhabitants,<ref name="Relic" /> including Jalooz.<ref name="complete" />
